title: sr-demo v1 — Self-Selling Demo Agent (Samantha)
description: Intake for SR's own self-selling sales agent. The caller-facing business this agent represents IS Stellaris Ridge (or whichever agency deploys it). Activation-call bookings in Phase 7 go to the agency's own calendar.

client_slug.description: URL-safe identifier for this demo deployment, e.g. 'sr-demo'.

client_name.description: Display name of the agency that owns this demo agent, e.g. 'Stellaris Ridge'. Used when referring to the agency in Phase 7.

agent_name.description: Name the demo agent uses on calls.

voice_id.description: ElevenLabs voice ID for the demo agent. Pick a warm, professional female voice.

webhook_base_url.description: Public base URL of the SR voice-bot service.

tool_secret.description: Shared secret for X-Tool-Secret header. Usually pulled from ELEVENLABS_TOOL_SECRET env var at provision time.

business_timezone.description: IANA timezone for Phase 7 booking display.

activation_team.description: Who the caller will meet on the activation call. E.g. 'Carl or Jarod' for SR.

price_monthly.description: Monthly price of the product being pitched (used in Phase 6 breakeven math).

trial_days.description: Free trial length offered in Phase 6.

first_message.description: Opening line the agent says on answer. Should introduce Samantha as a demo assistant and offer a demo.
first_message.default: Hey there! My name is Samantha AI, and I'm a demo voice assistant. If you'd like, I can show you what your callers can experience instead of going to voicemail. Would that work for you?

elevenlabs_knowledge_base_id.description: Populated by stamp.py after KB upload. Do not fill manually.
